notes.note: AI controls: Keep Firefox AI features on your terms with one place to turn them on, off or customize them individually.

[Page summaries][1]: Cut through long articles with quick, readable summaries available with a tap or shake. Now available in English, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian and Japanese.


  [1]: https://support.mozilla.org/kb/summarize-pages-ios
Fixed issues with the language picker, customization sheet and search bar.

system_requirements:
## Operating systems
 - iOS 15
 - iOS 16
 - iOS 17
 - iOS 18
 - iOS 26
text:
Got ideas or feedback? Join the conversation on [Mozilla Connect][1]. Need help? Our volunteer support community has you covered on [Mozilla Support][2]

title: Firefox for iOS 151.0 Release
